body:

This can help you reduce errors and improve user experience. * **API Integrations**: Use Base44's API integrations to connect with external services and automate tasks across multiple platforms. This can help you streamline your workflow and reduce manual effort.

This can help you reduce administrative overhead and improve scalability.
